title: Notes API — System + Code Detail
description: A small system view (gateway, notes service, db) where the Auth Service is modeled as a collapsible group — collapsed it's one box; expanded it reveals the real functions inside, including a recent fix to token verification. Demonstrates combining system-level and code-level content in one artifact.

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.description: Routes requests, enforces auth on protected routes.

nodes.label: Notes Service
nodes.description: CRUD for user notes. Calls Auth Service to verify tokens.

nodes.label: verify_token()
nodes.description: Verifies a session token's signature and expiry. Fixed to also check the token's revocation list, closing a window where revoked tokens were still accepted.

nodes.label: is_revoked()
nodes.description: New helper checking the Redis revocation set for a token's JTI.
nodes.code_snippet:
def is_revoked(jti: str) -> bool:
    return redis.sismember("revoked_tokens", jti)

nodes.label: issue_token()
nodes.description: Issues a signed session token for a user.

nodes.label: revoke_token()
nodes.description: New endpoint handler — adds a token's JTI to the revocation set on logout.
nodes.code_snippet:
def revoke_token(jti: str) -> None:
    redis.sadd("revoked_tokens", jti)
